canvas.previewHint: Thumbnail preview · double-click the file or use Open in tab for full view

files.empty: No files yet. Send a prompt to have the agent generate a design — files will show up here.

empty.title: Design with AI
empty.body: Pick a starter on the left, or describe what you want to design. The result renders here in a sandboxed preview.

error.title: Generation failed
error.body: Something went wrong while generating your design.
error.brokenJsx: This design has a syntax error, likely an incomplete early save. Regenerate or edit to fix.
error.undefinedRef: The design references an undefined variable or component. Likely a mid-run abort — try regenerating.

preview.clickToComment: Click any element in the preview to leave an inline comment.

tweaks.title: Tweaks
tweaks.emptyHint: The agent hasn't declared an EDITMODE block yet. Future generations will expose design tokens here.

chat.emptyHint: Start with a starter prompt or your own idea.
chat.placeholderRich: Describe a design… try 'Pitch deck for a fintech startup'

sidebar.designSystemHint: Link a repo to extract colors, typography, spacing, and other styling cues for future generations.
sidebar.startHint: Start with a brief, then add files, a URL, or a local repo to ground the result.

empty.title: What should we design?
empty.subtitle: Describe your idea below — or start from one of these.

comments.title: Comment mode
comments.body: Inline comments on the canvas arrive in v0.2.1. You'll be able to click any element in the preview to leave a note or an edit instruction.

providers.empty: No providers configured yet. Add one to start generating.

import.claudeCodeFound: Claude Code gateway detected at {{baseUrl}} — import?
import.claudeCodeOAuthBody: Your Pro/Max subscription can only be used through the Claude Code client itself. Third-party apps can't reuse the subscription quota. Generate an API key at Anthropic Console (same account, billed per token) to use Claude here.
import.claudeCodeOAuthCtaConsole: Get API key from Anthropic Console ↗
import.claudeCodeHasKeyTitle: Claude Code API key ready to import
import.claudeCodeHasKeyBody: Found a key in {{source}} for the gateway at {{baseUrl}} — click Import to use it here.
import.claudeCodeLocalProxyBody: Looks like a local proxy at {{baseUrl}}. This is the typical setup for reusing an OAuth subscription through a tool like Claude Code Proxy.
import.claudeCodeRemoteGatewayBody: Gateway at {{baseUrl}} has no API key in your Claude Code config. Import the gateway, then paste a key in Settings.
import.oauthErrorToast: Claude Code subscription can't be shared with third-party apps. Generate an API key at Anthropic Console.
import.claudeCodeImportedActivated: Claude Code imported and set as the active model provider
import.claudeCodeIHaveKey: I have an API key — paste it
import.claudeCodeShellEnvHint: Or: export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in your shell and relaunch from Terminal — we'll pick it up automatically.
import.claudeCodeParseErrorReasonNotObject: the top-level value is not a JSON object
import.claudeCodeMenuDesc: Read the signed-in Claude Code session
import.customMenuDesc: Enter API key and URL manually

toast.missingModel: Provider has no default model — add one first.

storage.restartHint: Choose where open-codesign stores config, logs, and local design data. Changes are saved permanently and take effect after restarting the app.
storage.locationSavedToast: Storage location saved. Restart the app to apply it.
storage.onboardingHint: Clear the setup flag so the onboarding wizard runs again on next launch.
storage.resetConfirm: This will remove your saved keys. Continue?
storage.onboardingResetToast: Onboarding reset. Restart the app to re-run setup.
storage.diagnosticsHint: Open the log folder to inspect logs, or export a redacted bundle for bug reports.

advanced.updateChannelHint: Stable: tested releases. Beta: early access (may have bugs).
advanced.checkForUpdatesOnStartupHint: Automatically check for a new release 30 seconds after launch.
advanced.timeoutHint: Seconds before a generation request is aborted.
advanced.devtoolsHint: Open the Chromium DevTools panel for the renderer.

welcome.title: Design with any model.
welcome.subtitle: Pick how you want to power your designs. You can change this later in Settings.
welcome.tryFreeSubtitle: OpenRouter free tier - paste an OpenRouter key, then start with openrouter/free or type any model ID.
welcome.useKeySubtitle: Anthropic, OpenAI, or OpenRouter. Auto-detected from the key prefix.
welcome.useOllamaSubtitle: Coming in v0.2 - Ollama integration is on the roadmap.

paste.title: Paste your API key
paste.description: Auto-detects your provider. Click Test to verify the key and endpoint before continuing. Your key is stored locally in ~/.config/open-codesign/config.toml (file mode 0600).
paste.statusIdle: Paste a key above — provider is auto-detected from the prefix.

errors.401: API key invalid or unauthorized. Check it in your provider dashboard.
errors.402: Your account has no credit. Top up and retry.
errors.429: Rate limited. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach base URL. Check domain/port/network.
errors.unsupported: Unrecognized key prefix. Supported: sk-ant- (Anthropic), sk- (OpenAI), sk-or- (OpenRouter).
errors.notSupportedProvider: {{provider}} is not supported in v0.1. Use Anthropic, OpenAI, or OpenRouter.
errors.rendererDisconnected: Renderer is not connected to the main process.
errors.detectIpc: Provider detection failed (main process unreachable): {{message}}. Restart the app and try again.
errors.detectNetwork: Provider detection failed (network error): {{message}}. Check your connection and try again.

advanced.title: Advanced — custom base URL
advanced.description: Override the default endpoint for your provider. Useful for relay services and self-hosted proxies. Leave empty to use the official endpoint.

preset.label: Preset
preset.hint: Not sure which to pick? Choose OpenAI Official for the official endpoint, or pick by relay name.

connectionTest.idleHint: Run Test to verify your key and connection before continuing.
connectionTest.runFirst: Run Test to verify your connection first

errors.404: Base URL path wrong. Try adding /v1 suffix (e.g. https://your-host/v1).
errors.ECONNREFUSED: Cannot reach base URL. Check domain/port/network.
errors.IPC_BAD_INPUT: Invalid input sent to connection test. Check provider / API key / base URL fields.

choose.title: Pick default models
choose.description: Start with a recommendation or enter any provider-specific model ID. You can switch these per design later.
choose.fastHint: Used for quick edits and inline tweaks.
choose.primaryHintFree: Free path starts on openrouter/free, but you can enter any OpenRouter model ID.
choose.fastHintFree: Keep openrouter/free for lowest cost, or replace it with a faster custom choice.
choose.costNote: Estimated cost varies by provider, chosen model, and prompt length.
choose.costNoteFree: OpenRouter free routing availability can change. If a free route is unavailable, type another model ID here.

notifications.commentNeedsSnapshot: Generate a design first before leaving a comment

inlineComment.title: Comment on
inlineComment.description: Clicked elements stay selected in the canvas. Describe the visual or content change you want, and open-codesign will rewrite the artifact around that target.
inlineComment.placeholder: Make this section more compact, sharpen the headline, and align it with the linked design system…

commentBubble.title: Comment on
commentBubble.placeholder: Describe the change, or leave a note for yourself…

commentsTab.empty: Click any element in the preview while comment mode is on to leave a note or an edit instruction.

panel.title: Comments
panel.empty: No comments yet. Click any element on the canvas to leave one.

scope.tooltip: Whether the change is scoped to this element or the whole design

text.font-bigger: increase font size on this element
text.font-smaller: decrease font size on this element

disabledReason.enterApiKeyToValidate: Enter an API key to validate
disabledReason.enterKeyToTest: Paste an API key to test the connection
disabledReason.unsupportedKeyForTest: Unsupported key format — can't test this key
disabledReason.providerDetectIpcForTest: Provider detection failed (IPC) — can't test this key
disabledReason.providerDetectNetworkForTest: Provider detection failed (network) — can't test this key
disabledReason.validateKeyToContinue: Validate your API key to continue
disabledReason.ollamaComingSoon: Ollama integration is coming in v0.2

errorBoundary.body: The rest of the app is still running. Reload this view, or copy the stack to file a bug.

errors.providerAuthMissing: No API key configured. Open Settings to add one.
errors.ipcBadInput: Invalid input passed to the main process.
errors.exporterNotReady: Exporter is still loading. Try again in a moment.
errors.rendererDisconnected: Renderer is not connected to the main process.
errors.providerMissingKey: The active provider "{{provider}}" has no API key. Open Settings to add one.

view.title: Designs
view.subtitle: All your saved designs. Switch, rename, duplicate, or delete.
view.empty: No designs yet — create your first one to get started.

delete.title: Delete this design?
delete.body: "{{name}}" and all of its history will be removed from the designs list. This cannot be undone in v0.

notifications.createFailed: Could not create a new design
notifications.switchBlockedGenerating: Wait for generation to finish before switching
notifications.busyGenerating: Wait for the current generation to finish, then try again
notifications.deleted: Design moved out of the active list
notifications.deleteBlockedGenerating: Wait for generation to finish before deleting
notifications.saveFailed: Could not save the latest changes
notifications.snapshotSkippedBody: The agent's JSX is truncated (missing ReactDOM.createRoot or unbalanced braces). Previous good version preserved. Send the prompt again to retry.

cause.missingV1: Base URL path is likely missing the /v1 suffix.
cause.hostUnreachable: Cannot reach host — check domain, port, or VPN.
cause.timedOut: Request timed out — check firewall or VPN.
cause.corsError: CORS error (should not happen in main process). This is a bug.
cause.sslError: SSL / certificate error (self-signed cert on relay?).
cause.unknown: Unknown error — check the full log for details.

meditationApp.title: Calm Spaces meditation app
meditationApp.description: Mobile prototype with phone frame, soft palette, interactive nav.
meditationApp.prompt: Design a mobile app prototype for a meditation app called Calm Spaces. Show a phone frame containing a home screen with a meditation list, play button, and progress tracker. Use serene typography, soft greens and blues, and lots of white space.

caseStudy.title: Client case study one-pager
caseStudy.description: Dark theme one-page PDF-ready layout with hero metrics.
caseStudy.prompt: Create a one-page client case study. The client increased qualified leads 40% using our platform. Include before/after metrics, a CEO quote, and a logo placeholder. Clean, minimal, dark theme.

pitchDeck.title: B2B SaaS pitch deck
pitchDeck.description: 8-12 slides for a healthcare-targeted SaaS pitch.
pitchDeck.prompt: Design a pitch deck for a B2B SaaS company targeting mid-market healthcare. 8 to 10 slides covering problem, market, product, traction, team, and ask.

marketingLanding.title: Marketing landing page
marketingLanding.description: Hero + features + CTA, tunable accent color.
marketingLanding.prompt: Design a modern marketing landing page for an AI productivity tool. Include a hero section, three feature cards, social proof, and a call to action. Use a warm neutral palette.

examples.title: Examples
examples.subtitle: Hand-picked starting points. Hover to preview, then drop the prompt into the composer.
examples.promptUsedToast: Prompt loaded — edit and send when ready.

emptyState.heading: What would you like to design?
emptyState.subline: Describe your idea in the chat, or pick a template to get started.

starterDesc.landing: Hero + feature cards + social proof + CTA
starterDesc.dashboard: Line chart + bars + table, dark theme

starterPrompts.landing: Build a landing page for an AI startup. Hero with a strong tagline, 3 feature cards, social proof section, CTA. Editorial typography, generous whitespace.
starterPrompts.pitch: Generate the first 3 slides of a pitch deck for a fintech startup: title slide, problem, solution. 16:9 format, navy palette, one orange accent.
starterPrompts.mobile: Design a 3-screen mobile app onboarding flow inside a phone frame: welcome, permissions, first action. Soft mint palette.
starterPrompts.dashboard: Build an analytics dashboard with: MRR trend line chart, pipeline stacked bars, top accounts table, and forecast gauge. Dark theme, teal + amber accents, plausible mock data.
starterPrompts.email: Design a transactional welcome email for a SaaS product. Single column, 600px wide, table-based. Logo header, greeting, 3 onboarding steps, CTA button, footer.
starterPrompts.portfolio: Design a photographer portfolio with masonry image grid using CSS gradient placeholders. Dark background, category filter pills, hover overlay with title and camera settings.
starterPrompts.casestudy: Create a one-page customer case study for a B2B fintech. Hero with client name, three large metrics with deltas, a CFO pull quote, a three-step 'How we did it' section, and a logo strip. Dark theme, serif headings, monospace numerals.
starterPrompts.animation: Build a showcase page with six organic CSS loading animations. Each in its own card: blob morph, leaf sway, ink drop, breathing circle, soft pulse, ribbon weave. Warm cream background, muted pastels, pure CSS/SVG only.

recent.title: Recent
recent.empty: Nothing here yet — start a new design to see it pinned at the top.

your.title: Your designs
your.empty: No designs saved yet. Click "New design" to create your first one.

examples.title: Examples
examples.comingSoon: A curated gallery of starter prompts is on the way.

designSystems.title: Design systems
designSystems.comingSoon: Reusable brand systems and templates are on the way.

create.title: Start a new design
create.subtitle: Pick a type so we can tailor the first prompt.

typeDescriptions.prototype: Interactive UI mockups with a phone or browser frame.
typeDescriptions.slideDeck: A multi-slide deck for talks, pitches, or summaries.
typeDescriptions.template: Start from one of the bundled starter prompts.
typeDescriptions.other: A blank canvas — describe anything else you have in mind.

fields.name: Project name
fields.fidelityWireframeHint: Greyscale blocks, no imagery — quick exploration.
fields.fidelityComingSoon: Wireframe vs. high-fidelity selection ships in a follow-up.
fields.speakerNotesHint: Adds a notes section under each slide for delivery cues.
fields.templateHint: Choose a starter — the first prompt will be pre-filled.

create.disabledHint: Add a project name to continue.

help.share: Designs stay on this device. Sharing happens through bundle export — no cloud account needed.
help.templates: More starters arrive in a follow-up; this list will keep growing.
